title: Chinese Buddhist: Awakening of Faith in Mahayana (Asvaghosa) (4)
description: From the Chinese Buddhist canon: Awakening of Faith in Mahayana (Asvaghosa)
introduction: From the Chinese Buddhist canon: Awakening of Faith in Mahayana (Asvaghosa)

translation.text: From Awakening of Faith in Mahayana (Asvaghosa): A core text of Chinese Buddhism, transmitted through the great translation period and forming the basis of East Asian Buddhist practice.
